introSection: Zyklon is a travelling steel roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari currently owned by US carnival operator Strates Shows. It has travelled with them since the late 1960s/early 70s.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This roller coaster currently has pink track with yellow supports. It previously had red track and blue supports, and was repainted sometime between 2016 and 2018. Prior to this, it had purple track with yellow supports.

fullText:
Zyklon is a travelling steel roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari currently owned by US carnival operator Strates Shows. It has travelled with them since the late 1960s/early 70s.

This roller coaster currently has pink track with yellow supports. It previously had red track and blue supports, and was repainted sometime between 2016 and 2018. Prior to this, it had purple track with yellow supports.
